query: INSERT INTO blocks (id, block_type, content, parent_id, position, space_id, page_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, (SELECT id FROM spaces WHERE id = ?), ?) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET block_type = excluded.block_type, content = excluded.content, parent_id = excluded.parent_id, position = excluded.position, space_id = (SELECT id FROM spaces WHERE id = ?), page_id = CASE WHEN excluded.block_type = 'page' THEN excluded.id ELSE blocks.page_id END
